executives.name: Alan Pangbourne
executives.background: Mr. Pangbourne has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles at Guyanese Gold Corp and Kinross Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Catharine Farrow
executives.background: Dr. Catharine Farrow is a professional geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She was previously the CEO of TMAC Resources Inc.

executives.name: Jason Neal
executives.background: Mr. Neal was previously the President and CEO of TMAC Resources and Co-Head of Global Metals and Mining at BMO Capital Markets.
